ctxMarket: Attention is focused on Solana ETFs, which have quietly accumulated significant assets under management. Security concerns are resurfacing after a major cross-chain protocol was paused due to an exploit.
ctxTalking:
• Solana and Hyperliquid ETFs are leading altcoin fund flows, despite limited mainstream coverage
• Jito Labs launched JTX, a self-custodial trading platform for Solana tokens and tokenized real-world assets
• Allbridge paused its cross-chain protocol following a $1.65M flash loan attack affecting Solana stablecoin pools
ctxMatters:
Large ETF inflows may influence institutional perceptions of Solana’s ecosystem. 
New trading platforms like JTX expand options for token and RWA trading on Solana. 
Security incidents on cross-chain protocols can affect user trust and liquidity movement between Solana and other chains.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Growth in Solana ETF assets and new product launches show ongoing ecosystem development.
Noise: Short-term speculation around the Allbridge exploit’s broader impact.
ctxGlossary:
ETF — Exchange-traded fund; a pooled investment vehicle traded on exchanges.
Flash loan attack — A type of exploit where borrowed funds are used to manipulate protocols within a single transaction.
RWA — Real-world asset; a physical or traditional asset represented as a token on-chain.

readMore.title: Solana, Hyperliquid ETFs dominate altcoin fund flows despite flying under the radar
Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
